\tzpentry{ID5929}{Donut Holes Equation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5929 introduces Donut Holes Equation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{align} X &= 2\mathrm{Re}(z_1 \overline{z_2}) \\ Y &= 2\mathrm{Im}(z_1 \overline{z_2}) \\ Z &= |z_1|^2 - |z_2|^2 \end{align}
